_comment: Master-narration plan. CRITICAL: gap MUST be 0 (guest clips have no trailing pad). Segments are in STORY ORDER and map 1:1 to storyboard.scenes (same order). kind 'tts' = Narrator (cloned MiniMax voice). kind 'audio' = a pre-made dialogue lip-sync clip (file = its .mp4; assemble extracts the clip's audio so the master-track slot == the clip duration). kind 'guest' = let assemble GENERATE the lip-sync clip from text in the character's own MiniMax voice. Run assemble_narration.py first, then compose_reel with --out-dir = this folder to REUSE narration.mp3 + align.

segments.text: <línea original del personaje B (su propia voz MiniMax)>
